## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Validation

- [ ] Offline checks completed
- [ ] DT or kernel schema/build checks completed where relevant
- [ ] Tested on hardware, or clearly marked untested
- [ ] Rescue path documented for hardware-affecting changes

## Hardware evidence

Provide the model, source commit, artifact hashes, boot method, and concise
result. Do not include credentials or unique device identifiers.
